raw_consumer_statement:
I am still disputing this charge as I never received the item. The seller has provided a fraudulent tracking number, and fraudulent pictures that show a package delivered to a house that isn't mine. Also, tha package in the fraudulent picture shows 'SENDERRA ' which is a pharmaceutical company. My order was an eight pack of long XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX 

Also, the seller initially said shipping would take roughly two weeks, then the fraudulent tracking number was provided and it was magically marked as delivered overnight. the dates and locations are obviously fraudulent, please help me Also attached is evidence from many other buyers of the same fraud committed by this seller on XXXX. 

the XXXX tracking number they supplied will not show my home address, please also check that also, each filter weights XXXX pounds, so the total box would be at least 24 pounds. this fraudulent tracking number says the package weight was 7 lbs
